data.description: Hey Surfers!  Here’s your clean, creator style step by step setup guide.   Claude Code Is Now Free And Runs Fully On Your Device You can now run Claude Code locally, forever, without paying for usage. You still get: Slash commands MCP servers Edit mode Sub-agents Everything runs 100% on you...

metadata.og:description: Hey Surfers!  Here’s your clean, creator style step by step setup guide.   Claude Code Is Now Free And Runs Fully On Your Device You can now run Claude Code locally, forever, without paying for usage. You still get: Slash commands MCP servers Edit mode Sub-agents Everything runs 100% on you...
